# HarfBuzzSharp 8.3.1
> Upcoming release · Ships with [SkiaSharp 3.118.0](../3.118.0.md)

## Highlights

HarfBuzzSharp 8.3.1 ships 2 product-facing changes across bug fixes and platform work.

## Breaking Changes

*None in this preview line.*

## Engine

- **Move the WASM fix to SkiaSharp** — Ships in this release; see the linked PR for the full change and rationale. ([#3088](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3088))

## Platform

- **Move the Blazor workaround into WASM** — Ships in this release; see the linked PR for the full change and rationale. ([#3082](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3082))
- **The Android NDK to r27c and update to 16kb alignment (#3096)** — Ships in this release; see the linked PR for the full change and rationale. ([#3099](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3099))

## Preview 2 (December 5, 2024)

Preview 2 carried the Android NDK to r27c and update to 16kb alignment (#3096); Move the WASM fix to SkiaSharp; Move the Blazor workaround into WASM.

[Full changelog](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/compare/v3.118.0-preview.1.2...v3.118.0-preview.2.3)

## Preview 1 (November 6, 2024)

Preview 1 opened this line with internal and infrastructure work only.

[Full changelog](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/compare/v3.116.1...v3.118.0-preview.1.2)
